title: Stal and Eclipse
description: A collection of mods that bring fun and adventure to Minecraft! This pack includes lots of mods that will leave you with lots to explore, build, and fight with.
body:
This modpack aims to improve the general minecraft experience. It provides lots of mods that will insure you have a blast!

This modpack includes but is not limited to:

-Mythical creatures! Such as dragons and sea monsters

-Immersive farming!

-Scary creatures that roam in the dark

-Ship building

-Immersive sounds and more background music

-Optimizations for client and server that helps the game run as smooth as possible

If you have any suggestions for this modpack that you would like to see included, please let me know!
